requirement_topic.zh: 澳大利亚进口商/责任供应商文件
requirement_topic.zht: 澳洲進口商/責任供應商文件

summary.en: Australian supply requires an AU-facing compliance file rather than a direct transfer of China domestic approvals. The file should identify the importer or responsible supplier, intended road-rule pathway, e-bike model and firmware version, battery and charger model numbers, RCM/EESS status for in-scope electrical equipment, AS/NZS or IEC evidence, labels, warnings, and product-safety incident handling.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚供应需要面向澳大利亚的合规文件，而不是直接转用中国国内批准。该文件应识别进口商或责任供应商、目标道路规则路径、电动自行车型号及固件版本、电池和充电器型号、范围内电气设备的RCM/EESS状态、AS/NZS或IEC证据、标签、警示及产品安全事故处理。
summary.zht: 澳洲供應需要面向澳洲的合規文件，而不是直接轉用中國國內批准。該文件應識別進口商或責任供應商、目標道路規則路徑、電動自行車型號及韌體版本、電池和充電器型號、範圍內電氣設備的RCM/EESS狀態、AS/NZS或IEC證據、標籤、警示及產品安全事故處理。

standards_or_laws: State and territory road rules for bicycle / pedalec use
RCM / EESS obligations for in-scope electrical equipment

gap.en: Typical China export packs contain GB 17761, GB/T 36972, GB 42295/42296 and UN 38.3 files but omit Australian importer details, AU road-rule classification memo, AS/NZS mapping, RCM label control, AU plug/charger evidence, and English warnings tailored to ACCC battery safety expectations. Those omissions are the practical documentation gap before listing on Australian marketplaces or supplying retailers.
gap.zh: 典型中国出口文件包包含GB 17761、GB/T 36972、GB 42295/42296及UN 38.3文件，但缺少澳大利亚进口商信息、澳大利亚道路规则分类备忘录、AS/NZS映射、RCM标签控制、澳标插头/充电器证据，以及按ACCC电池安全期望编写的英文警示。这些遗漏是在澳大利亚平台上架或向零售商供货前的实际文件差距。
gap.zht: 典型中國出口文件包包含GB 17761、GB/T 36972、GB 42295/42296及UN 38.3文件，但缺少澳洲進口商信息、澳洲道路規則分類備忘錄、AS/NZS映射、RCM標籤控制、澳標插頭/充電器證據，以及按ACCC電池安全期望編寫的英文警示。這些遺漏是在澳洲平台上架或向零售商供貨前的實際文件差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory / practical — documentation is required to support ACL, road-rule, RCM/EESS, and retailer due-diligence obligations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China domestic documentation supports CN market access but is not a substitute for AU supplier evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] This is a compliance gap: a China export pack focused on GB, battery, charger and transport files does not by itself create an AU-facing compliance file. The Australian file should connect the exact hardware to importer responsibility, road classification, RCM/EESS status, AS/NZS or IEC evidence, labels, warnings and incident handling.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 这是合规差距：以GB、电池、充电器和运输文件为主的中国出口文件包，本身不会形成面向澳大利亚的合规文件。澳大利亚文件应将确切硬件与进口商责任、道路分类、RCM/EESS状态、AS/NZS或IEC证据、标签、警示和事故处理相连接。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 這是合規差距：以GB、電池、充電器和運輸文件為主的中國出口文件包，本身不會形成面向澳洲的合規文件。澳洲文件應將確切硬體與進口商責任、道路分類、RCM/EESS狀態、AS/NZS或IEC證據、標籤、警示和事故處理相連接。

summary.en: China market files usually focus on GB standard test reports and domestic certification. Australian files need to tie the same hardware to local road classification, consumer law, electrical safety, battery safety, and claims-control obligations.
summary.zh: 中国市场文件通常聚焦GB标准测试报告和国内认证。澳大利亚文件需要将同一硬件与当地道路分类、消费者法、电气安全、电池安全及宣传声明控制义务相连接。
summary.zht: 中國市場文件通常聚焦GB標準測試報告和國內認證。澳洲文件需要將同一硬體與當地道路分類、消費者法、電氣安全、電池安全及宣傳聲明控制義務相連接。

standards_or_laws: GB 17761-2018 — Safety Technical Specification for Electric Bicycles
GB/T 36972-2018 — Lithium-ion batteries for electric bicycles
GB 42295-2023 and GB 42296-2023 — electrical safety and charger standards
